description:
Defines a diagnostic taxonomy entry for Scan64.
Matches the governance requirements in §8.10 of the system design.

skill_id.description: Unique identifier for the skill/diagnosis code
skill_id.title: Skill Id

parent_id.description: Parent code ID terminating at a top-level category (§8.1-§8.9)
parent_id.title: Parent Id

detection_requirements.description: How this skill is detected in a game or exercise
detection_requirements.title: Detection Requirements

positive_examples.description: FENs or game states demonstrating the skill
positive_examples.title: Positive Examples

counterexamples.description: FENs or game states demonstrating confusable situations that are NOT this skill
counterexamples.title: Counterexamples

confidence_calculation.description: How confidence in the diagnosis is calculated
confidence_calculation.title: Confidence Calculation

compatible_exercise_templates.description: IDs of exercise templates compatible with this skill
compatible_exercise_templates.title: Compatible Exercise Templates

incompatible_diagnoses.description: Other skill IDs that cannot be simultaneously diagnosed
incompatible_diagnoses.title: Incompatible Diagnoses

minimum_engine_evidence.description: Engine requirements to validate this diagnosis
minimum_engine_evidence.title: Minimum Engine Evidence

title: SkillDefinition
